register.response: Request timed out after 15s with no body received (curl exit 28)

login.response: Request timed out after 15s. Connection accepted, request sent, no response from handler

users_me.response: Skipped - cannot obtain auth token because login hangs

_notes: GET /health responds normally (200), but every /api/v1/* route hangs indefinitely.
Behavior is consistent for both curl direct and Playwright E2E suite (18 failed, 1 passed).
Server log shows successful boot: scene extractors registered, Socket.io initialized, LLM service init, port 3001 listening.
Server initialization triggered EADDRINUSE on attempted restart, confirming the original instance still owns the port.

While investigating, a separate compile-time bug was found: src/services/transactionService.ts called logger.child() but utils/logger.ts did not export a child() method. A patch was added to logger.ts to add child() so the server could re-bootstrap.
